title: 到而家仲有人話戴口罩無用

replies.msg:

Melanie Boling
All masks are difficult to breathe through when you have a severely deviated septum. Yet, in order to keep from being kicked out of stores or getting arrested, these people must be uncomfortable. What about their safety?

people obidiently wear mask as mandated,but still positive cases spikes..so,what really is the purpose of mask..for protection,.obligation or submission...
